questions.question: List two primary responsibilities of a Tier 2 Security Analyst. (3 marks)
expectedPoints: Conducting deeper investigation into incidents escalated from Tier 1.
Correlating data from multiple sources (logs, network, endpoints) to determine scope and root cause.
Implementing initial containment measures and documenting analysis findings.

questions.question: Compare the Internal SOC model and the Fully Outsourced MSSP model. Discuss two advantages and two disadvantages of each. (10 marks)
expectedPoints: Internal SOC Advantages: Full control over processes and priorities; Analysts develop deep knowledge of the specific business environment.
Internal SOC Disadvantages: Very high cost to build and maintain; Challenging to recruit and retain skilled staff 24/7.
MSSP Advantages: Lower capital and operational expenditure; Immediate access to a broad range of expertise and 24/7 coverage.
MSSP Disadvantages: Less direct control over daily operations; SOC analysts may lack deep context about the organization's business, leading to generic responses.
Conclusion: The choice depends on the organization's size, budget, risk appetite, and internal capabilities.
